summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UWS Digital wildlife sanctuary website with three new features: scroll entrance animations, Hindi/English language toggle, and updated sub-page CSS styling. All features working correctly with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: Scroll entrance animations working with IntersectionObserver
Hindi/English language toggle functionality working correctly
Language toggle active state styling working
Language persistence on page reload working via localStorage
Gallery page loads with responsive grid layout
Boating booking page loads with responsive form layout
Contact page loads with responsive contact form
Parking page loads with responsive layout
Cafeteria menu page loads with responsive layout
Ecohut page loads with responsive layout
All interactive features working (menu, popups, FAQ, booking controls)
No horizontal overflow on desktop or mobile viewports
All sub-pages using shared-base.css for consistent styling
